description_long: This sculpture is a complex, multi-figure composition featuring a tall central human figure with an elongated headdress, surrounded by several smaller human figures in various poses. The central figure appears to be seated or standing on a platform, with one arm holding a round shield and the other resting on a smaller figure. The smaller figures are arranged around the base, some kneeling and others standing, creating a sense of community or storytelling. The entire piece is rendered in a dark, likely wooden material, with smooth but detailed carving that highlights facial features, limbs, and accessories. The sculpture has a cylindrical base and a vertical orientation, with intricate details visible from all sides. The overall style suggests traditional African artistry, possibly Yoruba or similar cultural influence.
description: A dark, intricately carved wooden sculpture featuring a tall central figure with an elaborate headdress, surrounded by multiple smaller human figures in a communal arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tall central figure with a prominent headdress, shield, and several smaller figures clustered around the base.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the depth of the composition, with the central figure's profile and additional figures visible behind and beside the main subject.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the back of the central figure and the arrangement of smaller figures, with less detail on facial features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the elongated headdress and the layered arrangement of figures, emphasizing the sculpture's three-dimensionality.
attribute_subject_matter: group of human figures in traditional attire
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate installation environment.
